summary: Tested Declarations v2 stability and robustness. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: UI components verified - Error Boundary, Skeleton loaders, autosave indicator, wizard navigation all working. Rate limiting (5/min on login) caused some frontend errors during rapid testing but error handling UI displayed correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limit of 5 per minute causes 429 errors during rapid testing - this is expected behavior but affects automated testing

critical_code_review_comments: Error Boundary (DeclarationErrorBoundary.jsx) working correctly - shows 'Errore di Connessione' with Riprova button when API fails
Skeleton loaders (SkeletonLoaders.jsx) properly implemented for WizardSkeleton, AdminDashboardSkeleton, DeclarationDetailSkeleton
Autosave with debounce (1.5s) implemented in DeclarationWizard.jsx with visual status indicator (idle/pending/saving/saved/error)
Retry mechanism with exponential backoff (3 retries, 1s base delay) implemented via fetchWithRetry
Offline detection working - shows banner when navigator.onLine is false
All form controls (checkbox, select, input, textarea) have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Admin dashboard has proper filtering (status, year, search) and stats cards
Document upload/download working with proper validation (PDF, JPG, PNG only, max 10MB)
PDF generation with reportlab working correctly
ZIP download includes riepilogo PDF + all attachments in allegati/ folder
Message system with integration requests working - changes status to documentazione_incompleta
Status change with notification (push + email) working - push may fail for test tokens but email sends correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI components verified, minor rate limiting issues during rapid testing

seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded during testing: test_iter43.pdf
context_for_next_testing_agent: Declarations v2 stability testing completed. Key features verified: 1) Error Boundary catches React errors and shows fallback UI with Riprova button. 2) Autosave with debounce works - saves after 1.5s of inactivity. 3) Retry mechanism with 3 attempts and exponential backoff. 4) Skeleton loaders show during loading. 5) Offline detection shows banner. 6) All CRUD operations working. 7) Admin dashboard with filters, stats, detail modal with tabs (Panoramica, Sezioni, Documenti, Messaggi, Gestione Stato). 8) Client wizard with 14 sections, step navigation, signature canvas. 9) Document upload with validation. 10) PDF/ZIP download for admin. 11) Message system with integration requests. 12) Status change with push+email notifications. Rate limiting on login (5/min) may cause issues during rapid automated testing.

error_boundary.notes: DeclarationErrorBoundary catches errors and shows fallback UI with Riprova (retry) and Torna alla lista buttons

skeleton_loaders.notes: WizardSkeleton, AdminDashboardSkeleton, DeclarationDetailSkeleton implemented and working

autosave.notes: Debounce 1.5s, visual indicator (idle/pending/saving/saved/error), retry on failure

offline_detection.notes: Shows banner when offline, disables save operations

declaration_crud.notes: Create, Read, Update working. List with filters working.

section_update.notes: All 14 sections can be updated. not_applicable toggle working. Completion percentage updates.

admin_dashboard.notes: Stats cards, search, status filter, year filter, declaration list, detail modal with tabs

status_management.notes: Admin can change status with optional note. Status change triggers push+email notification.

message_system.notes: Admin and client can send messages. Integration request changes status to documentazione_incompleta.

document_upload.notes: Client can upload in bozza/documentazione_incompleta. Admin can upload anytime. Validation for file type and size.

pdf_zip_download.notes: Admin can download PDF riepilogativo and ZIP completo. Client forbidden from admin endpoints.

signature.notes: Signature canvas, terms acceptance, signature image saved as base64

form_controls.notes: All checkbox, select, input, textarea elements have data-testid and are functional
